testcase.name: launch

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 147 Current browser version is 146.0.7680.178 with binary path C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-EQCPUC5', ip: '192.168.0.24' Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}]
